violations.text: The cutting boards on the sandwich line are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the low boy behind the sandwich line. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the three bay have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
